insight: docs.mineacademy.org is Cloudflare-blocked for fetch_url; the docs source is in the kangarko/docs GitHub repo (e.g. docs/protect/permissions.md), readable via fetch_github_file. The Protect permissions page dumps Permissions.java verbatim, so permission description text must be fixed in main/src/main/java/org/mineacademy/protect/model/Permissions.java (also shown in-game via /protect perms), while page prose must be fixed in the docs repo.
